titleStmt.title: SII 5.767: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 767. (A.R. No. 203 of 1895). ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE SECOND PRAKARA OF THE KUTTALANATHA TEMPLE AT KUTTALAM, SAME TALUK AND DISTRICT.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīmat kuṭṭhālanāthasya śambhorjayati śāsanam . brahmādibhiśśirodhāryam bhaktimuktipradāyakam . Ādicaṇḍeśvarājñeyam śakābdam 10 337 mel cellāniṉṟa nam kumāraṉ parākkiṟamapāṇḍyade vaṟku yāṇṭu 3 10 1 vatiṉ Etir yiraṇṭāvatu miṉajñā yiṟṟu Irupatteṭṭān tiyatiyum pūrvapakṣa ttu ṣaṣṭhi yum tiṅkaṭkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa mṛgaśīrṣa ttu nāḷ gauta magotra ttu bodhā yaṉa sūtra ttu de vakulapperumāḷāṉa
maṅkaipperumāḷ gaṅgādharabha ṭṭaṉukku nam Arccaka n E kanāyakabha ṭṭar muṟaikku yivaṉukku Āyāsa māy nam Arcca nai muṭṭuvarukaiyum Āyāsamā ṉa E kaṉāyaka- bha ṭṭaṉum kumārasvāmibha ṭṭaṉum niṅkalāka Acaṟpaṅkāḷar nāluperum Ūrvaḻi poy nam Arcca nai muṭṭuvantu Itu nam kumāraṉ parākkiṟamapāṇyade vaṉ keṭṭu Ivaṉai varakkāṭṭi nam Arcca nai muṭṭuvarāmal naṭattuvāṉākavum Ūrvaḻi poy nam Arcca nai muṭṭuvitta mutaliyāṉa
kulacekarabha ṭṭaṉaiyum ciṟuttaṇṭaiyaṅkāṉum Aḻakiyāṉaiyum tirukkuṟṟālamuṭaiyāṉaiyum vijñyānabha ṭṭaṉaiyum nam kumāraṉ parākkiṟamapāṇḍyade vaṉ kopittu Ivaṟku jarnmahāni yum Attha hāni yum E tticā tāṉatukoṇṭu Itu varāmal nāṅkaḷ Ūrvaḻi poy muṭṭuvittavatukku muṭṭāmal pukka gaṅgādharabha ṭṭaṉukku paṅkukku Oruṉāḷāka kuṭuppomeṉṟu collukaiyil Ivarkaḷ poruntiṉa mariyātiyile mutaliyāṉa kulacekarapaṭṭaṉār Añcil
nāḷ Oṉṟum ciṟuttaṇṭaiyaṅakāṉu maḻakiyāṉ ṉāḷ Añcil ṉāḷ Oṉṟum tirukkuṟṟālamuṭaiyāṉ ṉāḷ Añcil ṉāḷ Oṉṟum civajñānabha ṭṭan ṉāḷ Añcil ṉāḷ Oṉṟum Āka ṉāḷ ṉālum vāṅki Ivaṉ Ām paṅku kāṇiyāṭciyāka paṭuttu Ivarkaḷ Uṭaimaiyum Iṟaiyiliyum kuṟaittu Ivaṉukku koṭukka Eṉṉumaḷavil Ivakaḷukku ni tukku paṟṟāka Itu koṇṭu Ivarkaḷ Uṭaimaiyum Iṟaiyiliyum niṅkalāka
Ivaṟukku Arccanāvṛtti yākak kiḻaimārpil paṟṟil purāṇapaṭṭaṉ yiṟaiyilikkuk kiḻakku kumārasvāmibha ṭṭaṉ yiṟaiyilikku vaṭakku taṭi Iraṇṭu nilam kāṇiyum Itaṉ vaṭakku ta ṟu nilam Araikkāṇi muntirikaiyum Āka nilam kāṇi Araikkāṇi muntirikaiyum Ituvum kaṉṉāneriyil paṟṟil Eḻāṅkaṇ ṭi Iraṇṭu nilam muntirikaiyiṉ mukkālukkuk kālukkut teṉmeṟku taṭi muṉṟu
nilam Araimā yituvum Itaṉ vaṭakkut taṭi Iraṇṭu nilam Araikkāṇi muntirikai yituvum Eṭṭāṅ kaṇṇāṟu kiḻaimārpukku kiḻakku taṭi muṉṟu nilam kāṇiyi (i)ṉ Āṟumākkā Ituvum Itaṉ vaṭakiḻakkut taṭi muṉṟu nilam kiḻ mukkāle Araikkāl Ituvum Itaṉ kiḻakkut taṭi muṉṟu nilam (nila)muntirikaiyiṉ Āṟumāk kāṇi Itil teṟkaṭaiya tiṟappukku
vaṭakkaṭaiya nilam kāṇiyiṉ Araiye mākāṇi Āka nilam Iraṇṭu māvumāki muṉṟāvatu kārmutalukku Arccanāvṛtti yāka viṭṭu va ceytu Acaṟpaṅkāḷa(r)ṟku Otta mariyāti śai vācāri(y)yamumābove this word is inserted ṇṭu taṉ••• nil kāṇiyumāka.A rcca naiyum maṟṟum nam Ālayattuḷpaṭṭa yaṅkaḷil svatantra ṅkaḷum Ivarkaḷ nālvaṟkum Otta mariyāti
samastaprāpti yum peṟṟu Arcca ṉaiyum muṭṭāmal naṭattikkoṇṭu potumpaṭiyum kaṟpitta Aḷavukku Immariyātiyile Ivvolai piṭipāṭākak koṇṭu Ācandra san=tatipraveśa me kallilum cempilum veṭṭi nam Ālayam Uḷḷa Aḷavum Eḻām paṅku kāṇiāṭcaiyāka � ṭu Aṉupavittu potavum pāṟka parākkimapāṇṭiya brahmā tarāyar Eḻuttu Ādicaṇḍeśva raṉ Eḻuttu .
Eḻuttu Ādiśaṇḍeśvaran EḻuttuThis line is a repitition..
Digital edition of SII 5.767 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
